_comment: Curate these against YOUR ingested documents. Each case names the gold source file (and optionally page) the answer should come from, plus keywords the answer should contain. hit-rate checks the gold source appears in the retrieved top-k; keyword_score checks answer grounding. Replace the examples below with real Q/A for your corpus.

cases.question: What is the maximum operating pressure of the pump?
What torque should the housing bolts be tightened to?
What is the recommended lubricant for the bearings?
How often should the filter be replaced?
What is the operating temperature range?
What power supply voltage does the unit require?
What safety equipment is required during maintenance?
What is the weight of the assembled unit?
